description: Extract the mature peptide features (Insulin A chain and Insulin B chain) from the human preproinsulin GenBank record at ~/UGENE_Data/human_insulin_gene.gb. Export the nucleotide sequence for the B chain to ~/UGENE_Data/chains/insulin_B_nt.fasta and its translated amino acid sequence to ~/UGENE_Data/chains/insulin_B_aa.fasta. Export the nucleotide sequence for the A chain to ~/UGENE_Data/chains/insulin_A_nt.fasta and its translated amino acid sequence to ~/UGENE_Data/chains/insulin_A_aa.fasta. Create a plain text summary report at ~/UGENE_Data/chains/chain_report.txt documenting the amino acid lengths of both mature chains.
